content_body:
So amazing!!! I own a vacation rental company in Destin and truly understand how much work goes into making a vacation complete. The reservation staff was so accommodating and full of information. We arrived late to a super clean and well-prepared home. Arrived late, but the lights were on and welcoming—thank you!!! The TV station was set on some light classical music. Our three children enjoyed fishing and playing in the creek. Loved the house, and we were absolutely impressed with the cleaning and set up of the house. Thank you for a great, relaxing weekend!

P.S. Zip-lining was a big hit and the Cabbage Patch Hospital was cool, too. Can't wait to return when we can stay longer. Definitely coming back to Crooked Creek, and will recommend this to all!!!
title: Will Recommend To All!
